Home›Services› Managed Cybersecurity
Managed Services

Managed Cybersecurity
Services

Comprehensive, fully managed security operations — from 24/7 monitoring and incident response to compliance management and executive advisory. Enterprise-grade protection without enterprise overhead.

What We Manage
Full-Spectrum Security Operations

We operate as an extension of your team — or as your entire security function. Every engagement is led by senior practitioners with Fortune 50 operational experience.

i.

Managed Detection & Response

24/7 threat monitoring, hunting, and incident escalation by U.S.-based security analysts.

Explore MDR →
ii.

Digital Forensics & Incident Response

Rapid breach containment, forensic investigation, and evidence preservation.

Explore DFIR →
iii.

Virtual CISO Services

Executive-level security leadership, board reporting, and strategy without full-time overhead.

Explore vCISO →
iv.

Penetration Testing

Network, application, and cloud penetration testing to identify exploitable vulnerabilities.

Explore Pen Testing →
v.

Compliance Management

SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA — we manage the entire compliance lifecycle.

Explore Compliance →
vi.

Personal Cybersecurity

Concierge digital protection for executives, high-net-worth individuals, and families.

Explore Personal →
Get Started
Ready to Strengthen Your Security?

Schedule a confidential consultation to discuss your needs.
